misconceptions: Plot summary mistaken for literary analysis
Naming a device without explaining how it shapes meaning
Forcing a single “correct” theme and ignoring ambiguity
Open essay: choosing a text without enough specific evidence
paper_rules: MCQ: poetry and prose passages; focus on craft and meaning
FRQ1 Poetry analysis: thesis on how poetic choices create meaning
FRQ2 Prose analysis: fiction/drama excerpt craft analysis
FRQ3 Literary argument: defend a claim about a work of literary merit with specific evidence
Essays scored on thesis, evidence/commentary, and sophistication as applicable
units_summary: U3 Longer Fiction and Drama Foundations (w≈0.11, q=55)
U9 Longer Works and Open Response (w≈0.1, q=50)
